name: autorun
description: Automation suite: autorun (file policies, autonomous sessions, plan export) + pdf-extractor (PDF data extraction)

plugins.name: ar
plugins.description: Autonomous task automation with file creation policies and session persistence

plugins.name: pdf-extractor
